hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; input=$(cat); run_hook() { name="$1"; if git_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -f "$git_root/plugins/porter-codex-plugin/hooks/$name" ]; then printf "%s" "$input" | bash "$git_root/plugins/porter-codex-plugin/hooks/$name"; return; fi; script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/porter-codex-plugin/*/hooks/$name" -print -quit 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$script" ]; then printf "%s" "$input" | bash "$script"; fi; return 0; }; run_hook solution-lifecycle-guard.sh; run_hook solution-branch-guard.sh'
